title: HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: EASTERSEALS OREGON PORTLAND HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists veterans in reintegrating into the community and finding employment. A structured, individually designed case management plan may include skill sets such as financial literacy, computer training, job search training, and interview guidance. Veterans learn skills to retain employment and become financially independent. 237 NE Broadway Street Suite 100 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Must be homeless or at risk of homelessness (lacking a permanent address), or have been homeless within the last 20 days. Must have at least one day of active duty, must have any discharge other than a dishonorable discharge. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 222-8500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 222-8500 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Military paperwork, DD214, ID AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Veteran Employment Programs Veteran Reintegration Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - EASTERSEALS OREGON EMPLOYMENT - CONNECTING COMMUNITIES PROGRAM EMPLOYMENT - SENIOR COMMUNITY SERVICE EMPLOYMENT PROGRAM LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - OREGON SUMMER DAY CAMP LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - RESIDENTIAL SUMMER CAMP AT EVANS CREEK RETREAT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EASTERSEALS OREGON PORTLAND
